summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apex Bath Remodeling landing page with multi-step quiz and appointment booking system. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with split-screen layout (hero image left, quiz right)
Company logo displays correctly on desktop and mobile
Step 1: All 4 home type options (townhouse, single-family, mobile, commercial) clickable
Step 2: All 4 timeline options (ASAP, this month, next month, unsure) clickable
Step 3: Address form inputs (Home Address, City, Zipcode) working
Step 4: Contact form inputs (Full Name, Phone, Email) working
Form validation working for all required fields
Email format validation working
Quiz submission - POST to /api/quiz/submit endpoint successful
Step 5: Appointment booking calendar shows available dates
Time slots (10:00 AM, 2:00 PM, 6:00 PM) all clickable
Calendar date restrictions working (5 days from today)
Appointment booking - POST to /api/appointment/book endpoint successful
Confirmation screen displays after successful booking
Progress bar updates correctly with each step
Step indicators show current and completed steps
Mobile responsiveness working correctly
Backend API endpoints all returning correct responses
Data persistence in MongoDB working
Error handling and validation working on both frontend and backend
